chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 258 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.18. 2. For orders on CMA No.2260/2018. 3. For hearing of main case. 22.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. This reference application is pending since 2018 and even notice has not been issued / sought till date. On 12.11.2018, the applicant was unrepresented, hence, the matter was adjourned. On 23.10.2020, following order was passed: “23-10-2020 Mr. M. Aqeel Qureshi, adv. for applicant. 1- To be complied with before the next date. 2- Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3- Learned counsel requests for time to prepare the case and also to file amended questions of law. Time is granted, however, subject to all just exceptions. Adjourned.” Today learned counsel is present and merely seeks time to file amended questions of law, as directed vide order dated 23.10.2020. It appears that for the last seven years this matter has been pending without any progress and the applicant, Commissioner Inland Revenue, Zone VI Corporate RTO, Karachi, is not interested in proceeding with the matter or complies with the orders passed earlier. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
